title: How to Build Officer Like Qualities (OLQs) in Your Daily Life
author: Capt. R. K. Sharma (Retd.)
data: The SSB selection system is built to evaluate 15 Officer Like Qualities (OLQs) grouped into four factors: Brain (planning/organization), Heart (social adjustment/effectiveness), Guts (courage/determination), and Limbs (dynamic activity). You do not need to fake these qualities; instead, cultivate them in your daily routine. Take initiative in college events, develop a sense of responsibility at home, practice logical speaking, and build physical stamina by participating in sports.
